title: Section 33
content: (1) Without prejudice to the foregoing provisions of this Act, the Author ity shall, in the discharge of its functions and duties under this Act, be bound by such directions on questions of policy as the Central Government may give in writing to it from time to time: Provided that the Authority shall, as far as practicable, be given opportunity to express its views before any direction is given under this sub - section. (2) The decision of the Central Government whether a question is one of policy or not shall be final. (3) The Central Government may, from time to time, issue directions to the Authority regarding the discharge of any functions by it under the clauses of sub-section (2) of section 11 and the Authority shall be bound to comply with such directions.
